rows.label: tev014401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ryou about conditions in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Ryou if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Ryou about the
infrastructure of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0001
rows.name:
I know what you're thinking: "If the roads aren't
finished and the city's only half built, then what
the hell have the construction teams been doing?"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0002
rows.name:
I assure you, we've been
working our asses off expanding
and maintaining the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0003
rows.name:
But it's a pretty big job. The xenos took a
city that was intended to be completed inside
the White Whale and dumped it onto this rock.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's not easy to build out a city
without the large-scale construction
units that went down with the Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Not to mention that we still can't get the resources
we need to do our jobs! ...Anyway, I know it's a pain,
but you'll just have to bear with us for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I hear they're looking for candidates
to try out new weapons at the Arms
test hangar over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Sounds like they're searching
for some real strong fighters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I don't know what they're gonna have them
do, but if you're confident in your skills,
why not go see what it entails?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0011
rows.name:
You might be able to get your hands on
some new weapons and Dolls before they
go on sale to the rest of the grunts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0019
rows.name:
I was bracing for the worst
after that enemy attack, but
I should have had more faith.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0020
rows.name:
After all, NLA was built aboard
the finest ship in the Earthlife
Colonization Project's fleet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Despite all the shelling we took, everything
survived without a scratch, and there was
barely any damage that required our attention.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0022
rows.name:
So now instead of wasting time on
repairs, we can get back to work on
the unfinished parts of the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0023
rows.name:
We're gonna find a way to erect buildings
that'll put the ones made with the White
Whale's construction units to shame.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Ryou about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0024
rows.name:
That Celica girl came by
again to check on Rock.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0025
rows.name:
She always seems so worried that
he'll have trouble adjusting to a
new job in an unfamiliar place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0026
rows.name:
But I think SHE'S the one having trouble adjusting!
Don't you think it's a little overprotective the
way she's always hovering around him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0027
rows.name:
He's a part of the construction
team now. She needs to start
treating him like an adult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Ryou about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Believe it or not, Rock's actually started
smarting off to Celica a little bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0029
rows.name:
I heard him tell her, "You don't need
to keep coming around to check on me.
Concentrate on your own work!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Anyway, the guy's got a point. He could
be a little immature when he first started,
but he's grown up a lot since then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0031
rows.name:
Celica hasn't come around as much since
he said that. I kinda miss seeing her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Maybe I'm gonna have to start going
for visits over at her place...[ST:wait ]
